package rulefixtures

import (
	"os"
)

// scenario for temp_file_predictable_name: `os.Create("/tmp/myapp-data.txt")` or `os.OpenFile("/tmp/" + fixedName, ...)` with predictable filenames
// fixture polarity: positive; family: security; severity: warning.
func scenario738Positive(data []byte) error {
	return os.WriteFile("/tmp/myapp-data.txt", data, 0600)
}
